title: Bitcoin analysis eyes ‘serious volume’ after Binance sees 9K BTC daily outflow
summary: Binance set multimonth records for net BTC outflows on Tuesday, adding to an emerging trend of positive inflows to the US spot Bitcoin ETFs.

title: Zilliqa Ledger app vulnerability lets attackers recover signer’s private keys
summary: A security vulnerability in the Zilliqa Ledger app is enabling attackers to reconstruct private keys using publicly available onchain data.

title: Stocks Fall Ahead of Alphabet as Brent Hits $95: Markets Wrap
summary: US stocks fell ahead of Alphabet Inc.’s earnings as traders awaited the latest read on whether spending by hyperscalers on artificial intelligence will pay off, while higher oil prices also weighed on sentiment.

title: NovaGold to Buy Billionaire Paulson’s Stake in Alaska Gold Mine
summary: NovaGold Resources Inc. agreed to acquire billionaire investor John Paulson’s 40% stake in the Donlin Gold project in Alaska, giving the company full ownership of a giant undeveloped bullion mine.

title: Bitcoin is NOT Changed by Proof Of Node
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin is NOT Changed by Proof Of Node
The proposal to temporarily restrict arbitrary data in Bitcoin transactions lacks economic nodes, protocol developers, and hashrate. History from the 2017 UASF shows nodes succeed only with broad investor and developer weight behind them.

title: Morning Minute: OpenAI Model Escapes Containment, Hacks Hugging Face
summary: Plus, the BTC ETFs stay green. The Clarity Act hits a wall over who enforces the ethics rules. And Jack Mallers walks away from XXI Capital.

title: Jack Dorsey's Block Launches Buzz, a Nostr-Based Slack and GitHub Rival for AI Agents
summary: The free, open source workspace runs on Nostr, gives AI agents their own cryptographic identities, and challenges Slack and GitHub.

title: BIS warns USD stablecoins can evade capital controls, challenging traditional market regulations
summary: BIS says that FX restrictions and capital controls are less effective against stablecoins than against foreign currency bank deposits.

title: US seeks forfeiture of $25 million in crypto tied to global fraud investigations
summary: US prosecutors seek forfeiture of $25 million in crypto recovered from five investigations into international fraud and laundering networks.

title: The US has collected about $13bn of Venezuela’s oil money. Where is it?
summary: Washington has given diverging accounts of where the earthquake-shattered country’s funds are going

title: The UK’s biggest university is a private company
summary: Supporters say franchised providers widen access to further education, but others doubt the real value of their ‘no frills’ courses
